      "dependencies": ["../stores/barberStore"],
      "usedBy": ["components/CartPanel.jsx"]
    },
    "CartPanel": {
      "path": "src/components/CartPanel.jsx",
      "type": "container",
      "props": ["isOffline"],
      "responsibility": "Panel keranjang belanja dengan daftar item, pemilihan barber (via modal jika belum dipilih), input diskon, ringkasan total, dan tombol checkout (online/offline)",
      "dependencies": ["../stores/cartStore", "../stores/barberStore", "../stores/uiStore", "../services/barberService", "./ConfirmModal", "./BarberSelectionModal"],
      "usedBy": ["layouts/MainLayout.jsx", "router/index.jsx"]
    },
    "ConfirmModal": {
      "path": "src/components/ConfirmModal.jsx",
      "type": "presentational",
      "props": ["isOpen", "onClose", "onConfirm", "title", "message", "confirmText", "cancelText", "confirmVariant"],
      "responsibility": "Modal konfirmasi umum dengan dua tombol (batal/konfirmasi) dan varian warna danger/primary",
      "dependencies": [],
      "usedBy": ["components/CartPanel.jsx", "components/VoidModal.jsx"]
    },
    "Header": {
      "path": "src/components/Header.jsx",
      "type": "presentational",
      "props": ["kasirName", "cartItemCount", "cartTotal", "onCheckout", "onSearch", "searchValue", "onToggleCart", "isMobile", "isOffline"],
      "responsibility": "Header aplikasi dengan logo, kolom pencarian, tombol sinkronisasi, nama kasir, ikon keranjang, dan badge offline",
      "dependencies": ["../stores/uiStore", "../stores/barberStore"],
      "usedBy": []
    },
    "LoadingSpinner": {
      "path": "src/components/LoadingSpinner.jsx",
      "type": "presentational",
      "props": ["size", "color", "className"],
      "responsibility": "Komponen animasi loading dengan skeleton grid untuk feedback saat memuat data",
      "dependencies": [],
      "usedBy": ["components/ProductGrid.jsx", "pages/CommissionReport.jsx"]
    },
    "Navigation": {
      "path": "src/components/Navigation.jsx",
      "type": "presentational",
      "props": [],
      "responsibility": "Navigation bar with links to POS, History, and Reports pages. Uses NavLink for active route highlighting.",
      "dependencies": ["react-router-dom", "lucide-react"],
      "usedBy": []
    },
    "OfflineBanner": {
      "path": "src/components/OfflineBanner.jsx",
      "type": "presentational",
      "props": ["isOffline", "position", "onDismiss"],
      "responsibility": "Banner peringatan mode offline yang muncul di header saat koneksi internet terputus",
      "dependencies": ["lucide-react"],
      "usedBy": ["layouts/MainLayout.jsx", "components/Header.jsx"]
    },
    "ProductCard": {
      "path": "src/components/ProductCard.jsx",
      "type": "presentational",
      "props": ["item", "onAdd", "isInCart", "cartQuantity"],
      "responsibility": "Kartu produk/layanan dengan informasi harga, stok, tooltip, tombol tambah, dan badge jumlah di keranjang",
      "dependencies": ["../hooks/useSoldToday"],
      "usedBy": ["components/ProductGrid.jsx"]
    },
    "ProductGrid": {
      "path": "src/components/ProductGrid.jsx",
      "type": "container",
      "props": ["activeTab", "onTabChange", "searchQuery", "onSearch"],
      "responsibility": "Grid produk dengan tab filter (Semua/Layanan/Produk), filter kategori, pencarian, dan modal quick pick (F4)",
      "dependencies": ["../stores/itemStore", "../stores/cartStore", "../stores/uiStore", "./ProductCard"],
      "usedBy": ["router/index.jsx"]
    },
    "RecoveryPopup": {
      "path": "src/components/RecoveryPopup.jsx",
      "type": "container",
      "props": [],
      "responsibility": "Modal pemulihan keranjang yang tersimpan sebelumnya, menampilkan daftar item dan opsi restore/mulai baru",
      "dependencies": ["../stores/uiStore", "../stores/cartStore", "../utils/constants"],
      "usedBy": ["layouts/RootLayout.jsx", "router/index.jsx"]
    },
    "ShortcutsHelper": {
      "path": "src/components/ShortcutsHelper.jsx",
      "type": "presentational",
      "props": [],
      "responsibility": "Menampilkan daftar shortcut keyboard (F1-F4, ESC, Ctrl+Z, +/-) dengan tooltip dan animasi pulse saat shortcut ditekan",
      "dependencies": [],
      "usedBy": []
    },
    "SyncQueueModal": {
      "path": "src/components/SyncQueueModal.jsx",
      "type": "presentational",
      "props": [],
      "responsibility": "Modal status sinkronisasi offline yang menampilkan jumlah antrian, progress bar, dan indikator selesai",
      "dependencies": ["../stores/uiStore"],
      "usedBy": ["layouts/MainLayout.jsx", "router/index.jsx"]
    },
    "VoidModal": {
      "path": "src/components/VoidModal.jsx",
      "type": "container",
      "props": ["isOpen", "onClose", "transaction", "onVoidSuccess"],
      "responsibility": "Modal untuk void transaksi dengan pemilihan alasan (radio button) dan konfirmasi sebelum eksekusi",
      "dependencies": ["../services/barberService", "./ConfirmModal"],
      "usedBy": ["pages/History.jsx"]
    }
  },
  "hooks": {
    "useAutoSave": {
      "path": "src/hooks/useAutoSave.js",
      "returns": "void",
      "responsibility": "Menyimpan keranjang ke localStorage secara periodik (setiap 5 detik) dan memicu custom event pos:auto-save",
      "dependencies": ["../stores/cartStore", "../stores/uiStore", "../utils/constants"],
      "usedBy": ["layouts/RootLayout.jsx"]
    },
    "useKeyboardShortcuts": {
      "path": "src/hooks/useKeyboardShortcuts.js",
      "returns": "void",
      "responsibility": "Mendaftarkan event listener keyboard global untuk shortcut F1 (cari), F4 (quick pick), dan Escape (tutup modal)",
      "dependencies": [],
      "usedBy": ["layouts/MainLayout.jsx"]
    },
    "useOfflineSync": {
      "path": "src/hooks/useOfflineSync.js",
      "returns": "{ loadQueue, processQueue }",
      "responsibility": "Mengelola antrian transaksi offline, sinkronisasi otomatis saat online, dan memicu event pos:sync-*",
      "dependencies": ["../stores/uiStore", "../services/barberService"],
      "usedBy": ["layouts/RootLayout.jsx"]
    },
    "useSoldToday": {
      "path": "src/hooks/useSoldToday.js",
      "returns": "{ soldToday, loading }",
      "responsibility": "Mengembalikan data mock jumlah penjualan hari ini untuk suatu produk",
      "dependencies": [],
      "usedBy": ["components/ProductCard.jsx"]
    }
  },
  "stores": {
    "barberStore": {
      "path": "src/stores/barberStore.js",
      "type": "Zustand slice with persist middleware",
      "state": ["barbers", "selectedBarber", "loading", "error"],
      "actions": ["fetchBarbers", "setSelectedBarber", "getSelectedBarberName", "clearStoredBarber"],
      "responsibility": "Mengelola daftar barber dan barber yang dipilih untuk transaksi. selectedBarber dipersist ke localStorage.",
      "usedBy": ["components/CartPanel.jsx", "components/Header.jsx", "layouts/MainLayout.jsx"]
    },
    "cartStore": {
      "path": "src/stores/cartStore.js",
      "type": "Zustand slice with persist middleware",
      "state": ["items", "discount", "history"],
      "actions": ["addItem", "updateQuantity", "removeItem", "setDiscount", "clearCart", "getSubtotal", "getTotal", "getItemCount", "pushToHistory", "undo"],
      "responsibility": "Mengelola item keranjang, diskon, subtotal/total, dan riwayat undo",
      "usedBy": ["components/CartPanel.jsx", "components/ProductGrid.jsx", "components/RecoveryPopup.jsx", "hooks/useAutoSave.js", "router/index.jsx"]
    },
    "itemStore": {
      "path": "src/stores/itemStore.js",
      "type": "Zustand slice",
      "state": ["items", "loading", "error"],
      "actions": ["fetchItems", "getItemById"],
      "responsibility": "Mengelola data item (layanan dan produk) yang diambil dari API",
      "usedBy": ["components/ProductGrid.jsx"]
    },
    "uiStore": {
      "path": "src/stores/uiStore.js",
      "type": "Zustand slice",
      "state": ["isOnline", "isSyncModalOpen", "showRecoveryPopup", "recoveryCartData", "syncProgress", "syncStatus", "pendingCount", "lastSaveTime", "saveStatus"],
      "actions": ["setOnlineStatus", "openSyncModal", "closeSyncModal", "setShowRecoveryPopup", "setRecoveryCartData", "setSyncProgress", "setSyncStatus", "setPendingCount", "setLastSaveTime", "setSaveStatus"],
      "responsibility": "Mengelola status UI global: koneksi online/offline, modal sinkronisasi, popup recovery, progress sinkronisasi, dan status auto-save",
      "usedBy": ["components/AutoSaveIndicator.jsx", "components/CartPanel.jsx", "components/Header.jsx", "components/ProductGrid.jsx", "components/RecoveryPopup.jsx", "components/SyncQueueModal.jsx", "hooks/useAutoSave.js", "hooks/useOfflineSync.js", "layouts/MainLayout.jsx", "layouts/RootLayout.jsx", "router/index.jsx"]
    }
  },
  "services": {
    "api": {
      "path": "src/services/api.js",
      "methods": ["axios.create (baseURL, timeout, headers)", "interceptors.request", "interceptors.response"],
      "responsibility": "Instance Axios terkonfigurasi untuk komunikasi dengan backend API (baseURL dari VITE_API_URL atau http://localhost:8000/api/v1)",
      "usedBy": ["services/barberService.js"]
    },
    "barberService": {
      "path": "src/services/barberService.js",
      "methods": ["getBarbers", "getItems", "checkout", "voidTransaction", "getCommissionReport"],
      "responsibility": "Layanan API untuk barber, item, checkout, void transaksi, dan laporan komisi (dengan mock data untuk getBarbers dan getItems)",
      "usedBy": ["stores/barberStore.js", "stores/itemStore.js", "components/CartPanel.jsx", "components/VoidModal.jsx", "hooks/useOfflineSync.js", "pages/History.jsx"]
    }
  },
  "utils": {
    "constants": {
      "path": "src/utils/constants.js",
      "functions": [],
      "responsibility": "Konstanta aplikasi: kunci localStorage (CART_STORAGE_KEY, CART_BACKUP_KEY, BARBER_STORAGE_KEY) dan interval auto-save (AUTO_SAVE_INTERVAL_MS)",
      "usedBy": ["stores/cartStore.js", "hooks/useAutoSave.js", "components/RecoveryPopup.jsx"]
    },
    "devInspector": {
      "path": "src/utils/devInspector.js",
      "functions": [],
      "responsibility": "Dev tool untuk menginspeksi komponen dengan klik Alt+Shift, menyalin nama komponen ke clipboard",
      "usedBy": ["main.jsx"]
    }
  },
  "layouts": {
    "MainLayout": {
      "path": "src/layouts/MainLayout.jsx",
      "sections": ["header", "main content", "cart sidebar", "mobile bottom navigation", "mobile cart bottom sheet"],
      "responsibility": "Layout utama aplikasi dengan tiga varian responsif (mobile, tablet, desktop) yang mencakup header, area produk, panel keranjang, dan navigasi bawah",
      "usedBy": ["router/index.jsx"]
    },
    "RootLayout": {
      "path": "src/layouts/RootLayout.jsx",
      "sections": ["Toaster", "Outlet", "AutoSaveIndicator"],
      "responsibility": "Root layout that wraps the entire application with global providers, toaster, and auto-save indicator. Initializes offline sync and checks for cart backup.",
      "usedBy": ["router/index.jsx"]
    }
  },
  "pages": {
    "CommissionReport": {
      "path": "src/pages/CommissionReport.jsx",
      "responsibility": "Halaman laporan komisi barber dengan fitur filter tanggal, pencarian, sorting, export CSV, dan summary cards. Menampilkan peringkat barber berdasarkan komisi.",
      "usesStores": ["barberStore", "uiStore"],
      "usesComponents": ["LoadingSpinner"],
      "route": "/reports"
    },
    "History": {
      "path": "src/pages/History.jsx",
      "responsibility": "Halaman riwayat transaksi dengan tabel, pencarian, dan tombol void untuk setiap transaksi",
      "usesStores": [],
      "usesComponents": ["VoidModal"],
      "route": "/history"
    },
    "NotFound": {
      "path": "src/pages/NotFound.jsx",
      "type": "presentational",
      "props": [],
      "responsibility": "404 error page shown when route is not found",
      "dependencies": ["react-router-dom", "lucide-react"],
      "route": "*"
    }
  },
  "entryPoints": {
    "main": "src/main.jsx",
    "app": "src/App.jsx",
    "router": "src/router/index.jsx",
    "routes": {
      "/pos": "POS页面 - ProductGrid + CartPanel",
      "/history": "Riwayat transaksi",
      "/reports": "Laporan komisi",
      "*": "404 Not Found"
    }
  }
}
